# docker/docker

Installs Docker CLI and daemon (required for containerized MCP servers)

## Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `docker` | Run docker |
| `docker --help` | Show help and available options |
| `docker --version` | Show installed version |

## Common Usage

```bash
# Check if installed
docker --version

# Show help
docker --help
```

## Links

- [Homepage](https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/)
